title: Unutursam Fısılda
overview: Unutursam Fisilda tells the story of the two sisters Hatice and Hanife and how their lives change after they meet a boy named Tarik. A film full of beautiful music and the 70s fashion.  Directed by Çagan Irmak. With Farah Zeynep Abdullah, Kerem Bursin, Gözde Cigaci, Evren Duyal.
